column2: Supplemental Table 5: Gene identifiers and location of Alteromonas genes considered in the gene set enrichment analysis

Pathway ID (Path) and KEGG orthology (KO) for each gene (gene ID) and annotation (annot) in Alteromonas (strain EZ55) considered in the gene set enrichment analysis. Also included are chromosome location (chr, start, end) and strand information. Differential expression statistics are given as log2 fold change (logFC) relative to ambient CO2 and gene expression level in log2 counts per million (log CPM) along with likelyhood ratio (LR) and probability (PValue) of differential expression.
